title: INVOKE_CANCEL Message
description: RCAN message type 15. Sent by a principal to request best-effort cancellation of an in-flight INVOKE (§19.4). The runtime SHOULD stop execution if the skill has not yet completed and emit an INVOKE_RESULT with status 'cancelled'. Cancellation is advisory — the runtime is not required to honour it if execution has already passed a point of no return.

message_type.description: Identifies this as an INVOKE_CANCEL message.

ruri.description: RURI of the target robot runtime that received the original INVOKE.

principal_id.description: Identity of the cancelling principal. MUST match the principal_id of the original INVOKE message.

session_token.description: Valid JWT session token authorising this cancellation. MUST be the same token or a token for the same session as the original INVOKE.

cancel_msg_id.description: The msg_id of the INVOKE message to cancel. The runtime correlates cancellation requests by this value.

reason.description: Optional human-readable reason for cancellation (e.g. 'user abort', 'timeout exceeded by caller').

timestamp_ms.description: Unix epoch time in milliseconds when the INVOKE_CANCEL was sent.

message_id.description: UUIDv4 uniquely identifying this message envelope.
